data.title: Shield AI chosen as autonomy provider for US Air Force's Collaborative Combat Aircraft Program; Hivemind software to fly on Anduril's Fury (YFQ-44A). Washington, Feb. 13, 2026.
data.description: Recently, Shield AI was chosen to provide mission autonomy for the U.S. military's Anduril Fury (YFQ-44A) drone. The Hivemind autonomy software developed by Shield AI will be onboard, showcasing the company's advanced technology. The announcement was made on February 13, 2026 in Washington. Shield AI is a leading deep-tech firm specializing in cutting-edge autonomy software and aircraft. This collaboration marks a significant achievement for Shield AI in the defense sector.

data.title: Urban Outfitters releases exclusive Valentine's Day vinyls from iconic and new artists like Fleetwood Mac and Clairo.
data.description: This year, Urban Outfitters is releasing an exclusive Valentine's Day Collection of 7" singles featuring iconic artists like Fleetwood Mac, Clairo, Sixpence None The Richer, sombr, and others. The collection will celebrate a variety of love stories and includes a diverse range of music. This special release is set to hit stores in Philadelphia on February 13, 2026. Get ready to groove to the sounds of love with this limited edition collection of singles.

data.title: Global insect-based pet food market to reach USD 4,150.2 million by 2035 at 10.0% CAGR, up from USD 1,610.5 million in 2025.
data.description: A study by Future Market Insights (FMI) forecasts that the insect-based pet food industry will see significant growth, with market value estimated to increase from USD 1,610.5 million in 2025 to USD 4,150.2 million by 2035. This growth represents a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 10.0%. The surge in the market is attributed to a practical change in pet nutrition practices, indicating a shift in preference among pet owners.

data.title: Drug Screening Market to reach $21.29 billion by 2030, with CAGR of 15.5%. 531 tables, 54 figures across 457 pages.
data.description: In Delray Beach, Florida, recent data from MarketsandMarkets™ indicates significant growth in the Drug Screening Market. The market is expected to increase from approximately USD 10.36 billion in 2025 to USD 21.29 billion by 2030, reflecting a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 15.5%. The report includes insights from 531 market data tables and 54 figures spread across 457 pages, highlighting the promising trajectory of the industry.

data.title: Hackers exploit employee monitoring software in 2 attempted ransomware attacks, as disclosed by Huntress researchers.
data.description: Researchers from Huntress discovered that workforce monitoring software was exploited in two separate instances of attempted ransomware attacks.

data.title: ISG is studying providers of AI and analytics for supply chains to optimize workflows and execution using data-driven solutions.
data.description: In Stamford, Connecticut, ISG has recently initiated a study focusing on providers who utilize data-driven AI solutions to improve operational workflows and boost supply chain execution. This study aims to analyze companies that are optimizing processes and utilizing advanced technologies to achieve efficiency in their operations.

data.title: Enbridge stock rises as Q4 results beat estimates; Adjusted EPS 63 cents, revenue $12.32B. Dividend raised to 97 cents. CEO credits low-risk framework.
data.description: Enbridge Inc's (NYSE: ENB) shares saw an increase in trading on Friday following the release of their fourth-quarter financial results, surpassing both revenue and earnings expectations. The company's adjusted EPS stood at 63 cents, surpassing the estimated 60 cents, while revenue amounted to $12.32 billion, exceeding the $11.75 billion consensus. In terms of yearly performance, Enbridge reported an adjusted EBITDA of $20.0 billion, marking a 7% increase from 2024, with distributable cash flow rising by 4% to $12.5 billion. The company has successfully met or exceeded its financial guidance for 20 consecutive years, indicating consistency in delivering results within a low-risk commercial framework amid economic uncertainties, as stated by President and CEO Greg Ebel. Enbridge has also announced a 3% increase in its quarterly dividend to 97 cents. For more details, refer to the full story on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Network Wireless Solutions (NWS) appoints Dr. Louis J. Hutchinson, III as Interim CEO starting March 1, while Xavier Williams exits role on February 28 after 4 years.
data.description: In Greensboro, North Carolina, Network Wireless Solutions (NWS) has revealed a leadership succession plan aimed at backing the company's ongoing expansion and sustained value enhancement. Starting March 1, Dr. Louis J. Hutchinson, III, who presently serves as President and Chief Revenue Officer, will take over as the Interim Chief Executive Officer. This change comes as Xavier Williams steps down from the CEO position on February 28 after holding the role for four years and boasting over 35 years of experience in the communication industry.

data.title: Figure Technology Solutions (Nasdaq: FIGR) reveals preliminary unaudited financial results for Q4 2025 & full year; files Form S-1.
data.description: On February 13, 2026, Figure Technology Solutions (Nasdaq: FIGR), a prominent blockchain-focused capital marketplace facilitating the creation, financing, exchange, and trading of tokenized assets, revealed initial unaudited financial figures for the fourth quarter and entirety of 2025. Alongside this disclosure, they submitted a registration document on Form S-1 encompassing preliminary operational outcomes for the corresponding periods.

data.title: Moderna stock surged after strong Q4 sales and maintaining 2026 outlook despite recent FDA setbacks.
data.description: Shares of Moderna saw a surge in value on Friday following the announcement of stronger-than-anticipated fourth-quarter sales numbers, along with the reiteration of their future outlook for 2026. Despite some recent setbacks with the FDA, the company's stock experienced a positive uptick.

data.title: DraftKings plunges after weak Q4 results, lower guidance, and missed user numbers. Cathie Wood of ARK Invest sells DKNG shares, buys crypto stocks.
data.description: DraftKings stock plummeted after issuing guidance numbers below expectations and falling short on user metrics. Renowned investor Cathie Wood's firm, ARK Invest, decided to sell DKNG shares while simultaneously acquiring positions in cryptocurrency stocks. This news saw DraftKings' shares tanking post their Q4 results, with Cathie Wood further unloading more shares amidst the turmoil.

data.title: AI stocks facing disruption concerns; top-performing ones from last year pulling back. Market shift evident.
data.description: Concerns about the impact of AI disruption have led to a shift in the market. Several top AI stocks, which saw significant gains last year, have experienced a decline. Despite this, some stocks have continued to perform well this week, showing resilience amidst the disruptions.

data.title: Trump considering reducing aluminum and steel tariffs. Industry stocks reacted positively on Friday.
data.description: On Friday, there was a report about President Donald Trump considering a reduction in aluminum and steel tariffs. As a result, certain industry stocks saw a positive response. This news was covered on Investor's Business Daily, indicating a potential shift in the market with significant implications for the companies involved.

data.title: Core CPI inflation rate at lowest level since early 2021, may impact Fed's decisions. S&P 500 remains stable.
data.description: The latest data shows that the core Consumer Price Index (CPI) inflation rate has dropped to its lowest point since the beginning of 2021. This decline in the core CPI inflation rate may cause the Federal Reserve to be less vigilant. In addition, the S&P 500 has stabilized amidst this news.

data.title: Coinbase misses Q4 estimates due to bear market, but shares rebounding.
data.description: On Thursday, Coinbase reported Q4 results that fell short of estimates amid a downturn in the digital asset market. Despite this setback, the crypto exchange is currently experiencing a rebound in shares.
